settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Review account details and authentication status.
settings.profileDescription: The same edit dialog is also available from the top profile menu.
settings.securityDescription: Google sign-in becomes available after Supabase is connected.

accountErrors.validation: Please review the account deletion request.

googleErrors.missing: No linked Google account was found.
googleErrors.single-identity: Google cannot be unlinked because it is the only sign-in method.

securityItems.google: Google sign-in available after Supabase setup
securityItems.mfa: JWT sessions and CSRF token verification are enabled

googleIdentity.title: Google account linking

googleIdentity.unavailable: Google linking is unavailable in local JSON mode or without Supabase setup.
